app.name: Agent Deck
app.one_liner: Terminal session manager for AI coding agents. One TUI for Claude, Gemini, OpenCode, Codex, and more.

screens.name: Main Session Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display and manage active AI agent sessions in a terminal-based TUI.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist user configuration including tmux socket settings without losing [tmux] config block.

acceptance_tests: Agent Deck preserves [tmux] config block on TUI save
Agent Deck runs sessions on separate tmux server when socket_name is set
